mapper.select: SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl WHERE wl.member_id = #{memberId} AND wl.date = CURDATE() ORDER BY wl.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKOUT_DETAIL (workout_id, title, `set`, rep, weight) VALUES (#{workoutId}, #{title}, #{set}, #{rep}, #{weight})
mapper.select: SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id, wd.id AS detail_id, wd.title, wd.`set`, wd.rep, wd.weight AS detail_weight FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id WHERE wl.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY wl.date DESC, wl.id DESC

SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id, wd.id AS detail_id, wd.title, wd.`set`, wd.rep, wd.weight AS detail_weight FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id JOIN MEMBER m ON wl.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY wl.date DESC

SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id, wd.id AS detail_id, wd.title, wd.`set`, wd.rep, wd.weight AS detail_weight FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id WHERE wl.member_id = #{memberId} AND wl.date = CURDATE() ORDER BY wl.id DESC

SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id, wd.id AS detail_id, wd.title, wd.`set`, wd.rep, wd.weight AS detail_weight FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id WHERE wl.id = #{id}
